title: kalimeris alyssoides
intro: Kalimeris alyssoides, also known as Chinese basket bellflower, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Kalimeris alyssoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
